description: Move LFG generated HTML cache files from main SSD to DevDrive volume to reduce write wear

userStories.title: Add LFG_CACHE_DIR resolution to state.sh
userStories.description: Add a shared cache directory variable to lib/state.sh that all modules source. If DevDrive is mounted at /Volumes/900DEVELOPER, use /Volumes/900DEVELOPER/.lfg-cache/ as cache dir. Otherwise fall back to $LFG_DIR (current behavior). Create the cache dir if it doesn't exist. Export LFG_CACHE_DIR for all modules.
acceptanceCriteria: LFG_CACHE_DIR exported from state.sh
If /Volumes/900DEVELOPER is mounted, LFG_CACHE_DIR=/Volumes/900DEVELOPER/.lfg-cache
If not mounted, LFG_CACHE_DIR=$LFG_DIR (backward compat)
Cache dir is mkdir -p created on source
bash -n lib/state.sh passes

userStories.title: Update all module scripts to use LFG_CACHE_DIR for HTML output
userStories.description: Change HTML_FILE assignments in scan.sh, clean.sh, btau.sh, devdrive.sh, stfu.sh, splash.sh, dashboard.sh, and chat.sh from $LFG_DIR/.lfg_*.html to $LFG_CACHE_DIR/.lfg_*.html. Each module already sources state.sh so the variable is available.
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 module scripts use $LFG_CACHE_DIR for HTML_FILE
bash -n passes for all 8 scripts
Modules still source state.sh before using the variable

userStories.title: Update viewer.swift navigation paths to resolve cache dir dynamically
userStories.description: In viewer.swift, the navigate action hardcodes lfgDir + '/.lfg_*.html'. Change this to check /Volumes/900DEVELOPER/.lfg-cache/ first, then fall back to lfgDir. Also update the LFG_NO_VIEWER background command to pass the correct output path. Update the home action's splash path similarly.
acceptanceCriteria: viewer.swift checks DevDrive cache path first, falls back to lfgDir
Navigation to all modules works when DevDrive is mounted
Navigation still works when DevDrive is NOT mounted (fallback)
swiftc compiles without errors

userStories.title: Update LFG agents to use DevDrive cache paths
userStories.description: Update the lfg-scan, lfg-clean, lfg-backup, lfg-devdrive, and lfg-monitor agent specifications in ~/.claude/agents/ to reference LFG_CACHE_DIR awareness. Update the CLAUDE.md key paths table to document the new cache location.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent descriptions mention DevDrive cache awareness
CLAUDE.md key paths table updated with cache dir
No hardcoded /Users/jeremiah paths in agent specs for cache

userStories.title: Update ui.js refreshView to handle DevDrive cache paths
userStories.description: The LFG.refreshView() function in ui.js uses window.location.pathname to extract the module name via regex. This regex must work regardless of whether the HTML is served from /Users/jeremiah/tools/@yj/lfg/ or /Volumes/900DEVELOPER/.lfg-cache/. The existing regex .lfg_(\w+).html already handles this since it only matches the filename, but verify and add a comment.
acceptanceCriteria: refreshView regex works with both cache locations
node -e passes on ui.js

userStories.title: End-to-end verification and notification
userStories.description: Run lfg splash with DevDrive mounted, verify HTML files are written to /Volumes/900DEVELOPER/.lfg-cache/, navigate to all modules, confirm cache hits from DevDrive. Add a startup notification via LFG.notifications.add() indicating cache location.
acceptanceCriteria: lfg splash writes .lfg_splash.html to DevDrive cache
Navigation to WTFS/DTF/BTAU/DEVDRIVE/STFU all work from DevDrive cache
Splash shows notification indicating cache location
All syntax checks pass
